title: landolphia camptoloba
intro: Landolphia camptoloba is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the yellow-flowered Landolphia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains a range of bioactive compounds, including flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits associated with Landolphia camptoloba include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce fever, treat wounds, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
